item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:kill","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":false,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The causal DO→DIE core is present, but the inlined death event binds a local, unconnected someone and is forced to the act time; link that participant to outer Y and represent the resulting death at its own possibly later time, or remove the redundant event block, then reassess the faithful flag."}
